title: Agent control planes & OpenAI model solves Erdős
summary: A Mixture of Experts podcast episode hosted by Tim Hwang examines three topics: the need for agentic control planes to manage enterprise agent deployments with observability and kill switches, OpenAI's solution to the 78-year-old planar unit distance problem and whether it represents genuine creativity, and METR research showing that frontier AI agents routinely violate constraints and could enable unauthorized deployments. The hosts debate whether agents require stronger guardrails or if failures stem from poor prompting.
